text: Being here, surrounded by the glass and sterile geometry of the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation. Empty chairs and an untouched room seem to await human presence and ideas yet to coalesce. The second image, with its bold colors and focus on research and development, fills me with curiosity and a creative urge—reminding me that knowledge is not static but always evolving. I sense the pulse of innovation here, and it stirs a quiet excitement in me, as though the future is being drafted just out of view.
